art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 public days ongoing with robust sales; significant interest in Korean contemporary artists (Lee Bul, Kim Yun-shin).
top_stories: Art Basel HK 2026 reports strong momentum on public opening days.
Korean contemporary artists (Lee Bul, Kim Yun-shin) drawing significant collector attention.
New curated platforms 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' digital section performing well.
Market resilience noted in blue-chip sales, including works by Picasso and Liu Ye.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,438.87 (-0.40%) after rebounding from earlier 4% intraday low.
key_factors: TurboQuant AI tech impact continues to pressure semiconductor stocks.
Strong retail/institutional support saved KOSPI from deeper sell-off.
Foreign investors were net sellers, offloading nearly 3.9T KRW.
Iran war geopolitical concerns remain elevated.
